scripts.manifests:validate: node packages/docs/src/cli/index.mjs validate apps/sevara/public/publication-manifest.json && node packages/docs/src/cli/index.mjs validate apps/worldbook/public/publication-manifest.json && node tooling/build/verify-publication-artifacts.mjs
scripts.publish:prepare: pnpm content:sync && pnpm content:verify:pinned && pnpm web-content:generate && pnpm pdf:build && pnpm build:apps && pnpm manifests:build && pnpm manifests:validate
scripts.build: pnpm content:verify && pnpm web-content:verify && pnpm build:apps && pnpm manifests:validate
scripts.cloudflare:check: pnpm --filter @skopunarverk/landing cloudflare:check && pnpm --filter @skopunarverk/sevara-site cloudflare:check && pnpm --filter @skopunarverk/worldbook-site cloudflare:check
scripts.deploy:sevara: pnpm build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config apps/sevara/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:worldbook: pnpm build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config apps/worldbook/wrangler.jsonc
